## What

Brief description of the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt` clean (`gofmt -l pkg example`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where practical
- [ ] Updated docs (package README / ARCHITECTURE / ROADMAP) if public API changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — screenshots/GIFs for visual changes are welcome.
